metadata.significance: Refers to Mecca as the city and emphasizes the steep path of righteousness

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ

translations.en_sahih: I swear by this city, Makkah -
translations.en_yusufali: I do call to witness this City;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Aku bersumpah dengan negeri (Makkah) ini;

translations.en_sahih: And you, [O Muhammad], are free of restriction in this city -
translations.en_yusufali: And thou art a freeman of this City;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedang engkau (wahai Muhammad) tinggal di negeri ini (sentiasa ditindas),

translations.en_sahih: And [by] the father and that which was born [of him],
translations.en_yusufali: And (the mystic ties of) parent and child;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi manusia yang melahirkan zuriat, dan zuriat yang dilahirkannya;

translations.en_sahih: We have certainly created man into hardship.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily We have created man into toil and struggle.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami telah jadikan manusia sentiasa dalam keadaan menghadapi kesulitan dan kesukaran (jasmani dan rohaninya);

ayahs.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّن يَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ أَحَدٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Ayahsabu an lan yaqdira AAalayhi ahadun

translations.en_sahih: Does he think that never will anyone overcome him?
translations.en_yusufali: Thinketh he, that none hath power over him?
translations.ms_basmeih: Patutkah manusia yang demikian keadaannya (terpedaya dengan kekuasaan yang ada padanya dan) menyangka bahawa tidak ada sesiapapun yang dapat mengatasi kekuasaannya (dan menyeksakannya)?

translations.en_sahih: He says, "I have spent wealth in abundance."
translations.en_yusufali: He may say (boastfully); Wealth have I squandered in abundance!
translations.ms_basmeih: Manusia yang demikian keadaannya (tidaklah patut ia bermegah-megah dengan kekayaannya dan) berkata: "Aku telah habiskan harta benda yang banyak (dalam usaha menegakkan nama dan bangsa).

translations.en_sahih: Does he think that no one has seen him?
translations.en_yusufali: Thinketh he that none beholdeth him?
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah ia menyangka bahawa tidak ada sesiapapun yang melihatnya (dan mengetahui tujuannya menghabiskan harta bendanya itu?

translations.en_sahih: Have We not made for him two eyes?
translations.en_yusufali: Have We not made for him a pair of eyes?-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mengapa manusia terpedaya dan bermegah-megah?) Tidakkah Kami telah menjadikan baginya: dua mata (untuk ia memerhatikan kekuasaan dan kekayaan Kami?) -

translations.en_sahih: And a tongue and two lips?
translations.en_yusufali: And a tongue, and a pair of lips?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan lidah serta dua bibir (untuk ia menyempurnakan sebahagian besar dari hajat-hajatnya)?

translations.en_sahih: And have shown him the two ways?
translations.en_yusufali: And shown him the two highways?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami telah menunjukkan kepadanya dua jalan, (jalan kebaikan untuk dijalaninya, dan jalan kejahatan untuk dijauhi)?

translations.en_sahih: But he has not broken through the difficult pass.
translations.en_yusufali: But he hath made no haste on the path that is steep.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dalam pada itu manusia tidak (memilih jalan kebaikan) merempuh masuk mengerjakan amal-amal yang tinggi darjatnya di sisi Tuhan;

translations.en_sahih: And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass?
translations.en_yusufali: And what will explain to thee the path that is steep?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apa jalannya engkau dapat mengetahui: apa dia amal-amal yang tinggi darjatnya di sisi Tuhan itu?

translations.en_sahih: It is the freeing of a slave
translations.en_yusufali: (It is:) freeing the bondman;
translations.ms_basmeih: (Di antara amal-amal itu - bagi orang yang mampu) ialah: memerdekakan hamba abdi;

ayahs.arabic: أَوْ إِطْعَـٰمٌ فِى يَوْمٍ ذِى مَسْغَبَةٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Aw itAAamun fee yawmin thee masghabatin

translations.en_sahih: Or feeding on a day of severe hunger
translations.en_yusufali: Or the giving of food in a day of privation
translations.ms_basmeih: Atau memberi makan pada hari kelaparan -

translations.en_sahih: An orphan of near relationship
translations.en_yusufali: To the orphan with claims of relationship,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kepada anak yatim dari kaum kerabat,

translations.en_sahih: Or a needy person in misery
translations.en_yusufali: Or to the indigent (down) in the dust.
translations.ms_basmeih: Atau kepada orang miskin yang terlantar di atas tanah.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْمَرْحَمَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma kana mina allatheena amanoo watawasaw bialssabri watawasaw bialmarhamati

translations.en_sahih: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion.
translations.en_yusufali: Then will he be of those who believe, and enjoin patience, (constancy, and self-restraint), and enjoin deeds of kindness and compassion.
translations.ms_basmeih: Selain dari (tidak mengerjakan amal-amal) itu, ia (tidak pula) menjadi dari orang-orang yang beriman dan berpesan-pesan dengan sabar serta berpesan-pesan dengan kasih sayang.

translations.en_sahih: Those are the companions of the right.
translations.en_yusufali: Such are the Companions of the Right Hand.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ketahuilah! Bahawa orang-orang yang beriman serta berusaha mengerjakan amal-amal yang tinggi darjatnya di sisi Tuhan), merekalah golongan pihak kanan (yang akan beroleh Syurga).

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا هُمْ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatheena kafaroo biayatina hum ashabu almashamati

translations.en_sahih: But they who disbelieved in Our signs - those are the companions of the left.
translations.en_yusufali: But those who reject Our Signs, they are the (unhappy) Companions of the Left Hand.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (sebaliknya) orang-orang yang kufur ingkar akan ayat-ayat keterangan Kami, merekalah golongan pihak kiri. -

translations.en_sahih: Over them will be fire closed in.
translations.en_yusufali: On them will be Fire vaulted over (all round).
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka ditimpakan (azab seksa) neraka yang ditutup rapat (supaya kuat bakarannya).
